THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DECUIRE, HARRY SUED AS HARRY MCGURIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 66 GEARY #409, STAYED UNTIL SEP-05-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59PM. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR MONEY. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS.
